nasb.text: And He came to her and raised her up, taking her by the hand, and the fever left her, and she waited on them.

esv.text: And he came and took her by the hand and lifted her up, and the fever left her, and she began to serve them.

cnv.text: 耶穌走到她面前，拉著她的手，扶她起來，熱就退了，她就服事他們。

ccb.text: 耶稣走到她的床边，拉着她的手扶她起来，她的烧立刻退了，便起来服侍他们。

csbs.text: 耶稣上前去，握着她的手，扶她起来，烧就退了。于是她就服事他们。
